M-033.NAME: mygrace-integrity-cleanup
M-033.path: docs/graph-index.xml docs/plan-index.xml docs/verification-index.xml docs/current-status.xml docs/plans/Phase-21.xml docs/plans/Phase-26.xml docs/handoff/STABILIZATION-PHASE-26.xml README.md AGENTS.md
M-033.owns: MyGRACE index consistency, stale Full Tunnel cleanup references, active verification surface correctness, and AI/operator handoff accuracy

exports.check-index-sync: Verifies graph, plan, and verification indexes match per-entity files
exports.check-obsolete-routing-artifacts: Identifies active tests or docs that still require removed split-tunnel modules
exports.check-handoff-read-order: Ensures README and project docs point agents to MyGRACE indexes, not monolithic GRACE files
exports.artifact-stabilization-handoff: Final local stabilization handoff for Phase-26

constraints.constraint-1: Do not change runtime behavior while cleaning documentation and verification references.
constraints.constraint-2: Historical references may remain only when explicitly archived or superseded.

execution-notes.note-1: Phase-21 step-1 audit classified stale routing references as active cleanup targets, historical/superseded references, or valid Full Tunnel regression assertions.
execution-notes.note-2: Phase-21 step-4 archived obsolete routing-policy/ipset tests under backend/tests/archive/phase17_removed_routing with non-test filenames to keep pytest collection aligned with Full Tunnel runtime.
execution-notes.note-3: Phase-21 step-5 synchronized index comments, dependency CrossLinks, AI handoff text, and active frontend-admin per-entity wording with MyGRACE and Full Tunnel reality.
execution-notes.note-4: Phase-21 step-6 recorded local MyGRACE integrity evidence and classified live VPS evidence as not required for this documentation-only cleanup phase.
execution-notes.note-5: Phase-26 created final operator handoff and verification matrix for recovery, compact UI, and session-security work without changing deploy/install scripts.

M-033.hotspot: H-020: Stale split-tunnel tests and phase references can break verification even when runtime Full Tunnel code is correct
